methods.description: Isolation of total RNA from plant leaves and elimination of genomic DNA to prepare samples for RT-qPCR analysis.

steps.description: Total RNA was isolated from leaves (from plants in the stage S2 according to Li et al. 2016) by extraction with Trizol (Invitrogen), as recommended by the manufacturer.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate total RNA from plant leaves using Trizol

steps.description: The remaining genomic DNA was eliminated by DNase digestion of the RNA samples.
steps.searchable_summary: perform DNase digestion to remove genomic DNA from RNA samples

methods.description: Quantitative real-time RT-PCR analysis to quantify gene expression levels in transgenic and non-transgenic tobacco plants.

steps.description: RT-qPCR assay was performed as described by Andrade et al. (2016).
steps.searchable_summary: perform RT-qPCR assay following Andrade et al. 2016 protocol

steps.description: Three biological replications for each line were used for the cDNA synthesis.
steps.searchable_summary: synthesize cDNA from RNA samples with three biological replications

steps.description: The primers for the RcDREB1 transgene, ATA AGG ATG AGA and GCA ACA GGA GTC GAA TAA G, were designed using the Primer-Quest Tool (IDT Integrated DNA Technologies, Inc).
steps.searchable_summary: design primers for RcDREB1 transgene using Primer-Quest Tool

steps.description: The expression levels were calculated from the threshold cycle according to the 2 −ΔΔCT method (Livak and Schmittgen 2001).
steps.searchable_summary: calculate gene expression levels using 2 −ΔΔCT method
